caption: A group of people, primarily men and women in traditional Indian attire, are seated in a formal assembly hall with tiered green seating and brown wooden desks. Many of the men wear white kurtas, some topped with dark vests, while the women wear colorful sarees. In the front row, a man in a white kurta and dark vest is seen reacting to something, transitioning from crossing his arms to raising his hand and gesturing toward his head. To his right, another man in a white kurta remains seated and attentive. Behind them, other officials sit quietly, with some leaning back or looking toward the center of the room. The setting is static, with no visible on-screen text or logos, as the sequence captures a brief moment of movement and interaction among the attendees within the legislative environment.
